creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Originally reported as https://bugs.pcbsd.org/issues/11598 then I was advised that the problem is not specific to PC-BSD. 

Affected hardware includes Toshiba Satellite Pro C50-A-1E6 (part PSCG7E-02D042EN). https://forums.pcbsd.org/thread-20234-post-111879.html#pid111879 notes that a change of branch, down to 10.2-RELEASE, allowed all affected computers to recognise the Wi-Fi hardware.
